## aurelian gcp analyze sa-key-analysis

Extract metadata from a GCP service account key JSON file without making any API calls. Reveals project ID, service account email, and key ID.

```
aurelian gcp analyze sa-key-analysis [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help              help for sa-key-analysis
  -k, --key-file string   Path to GCP service account key JSON file (required)
```
